title: Task outcome: Read-only audit of auto-growth/auto-compound safety: whether finish_task should write accepted r
summary: Completed read-only audit of DinoBrain auto-growth/auto-compound safety. Finding: finish_task auto-growth and finish_task-triggered compounding currently write agent-derived task outcomes/behavior rules directly into 50_Instances/accepted, which default retrieval and auto_sync treat as trusted/syncable. Minimum safe change is to route generated growth through 50_Instances/candidates plus 80_Review_Queue/promotion while preserving traces and review-approved retrieval.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Completed read-only audit of DinoBrain auto-growth/auto-compound safety. Finding: finish_task auto-growth and finish_task-triggered compounding currently write agent-derived task outcomes/behavior rules directly into 50_Instances/accepted, which default retrieval and auto_sync treat as trusted/syncable. Minimum safe change is to route generated growth through 50_Instances/candidates plus 80_Review_Queue/promotion while preserving traces and review-approved retrieval.
request: Read-only audit of auto-growth/auto-compound safety: whether finish_task should write accepted records directly, minimum change preserving closed-loop usefulness while preventing unsafe memory pollution. Identify exact files/tests. Do not edit files.
decisions: Do not let finish_task auto-growth or auto-compound write generated records directly to 50_Instances/accepted by default.
Preserve closed-loop usefulness by writing task traces and pending review candidates, then rely on review_candidate to promote accepted records for later Context Packs.
Keep trace_only for read-only audits so audits do not compound themselves.
next_steps: Refactor src/index.ts writeFinishGrowthRecords to emit candidate/review records instead of accepted task-memory records.
Refactor src/compounding.ts promoteSignal to emit behavior-rule candidates/review records by default and reserve accepted writes for review_candidate.
Update scripts/verify-codex-closed-loop.mjs and scripts/verify-compounding-loop.mjs to assert candidate/review gating before accepted retrieval.
